overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character jogging through a futuristic waterfront promenade during golden hour. The character moves through a curved glass-canopy walkway, turns at the open waterfront, and returns through a populated plaza area with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with curved glass canopy

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging pace
approaching the open end of the covered walkway with waterfront visible ahead

agents.ego_description: jogging through the covered promenade toward the waterfront exit

entered.detail: futuristic curved wooden and glass roof structure covering the walkway
illuminated digital advertisement with purple and white graphics
metal railing overlooking the water visible through the open sides
tall palm trees visible at the end of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character jogs through a covered waterfront promenade with a distinctive curved glass and wood canopy overhead. Long shadows stretch across the paved walkway as the character approaches a digital billboard and the open waterfront visible ahead.

events.description: direct sun flare as character faces the setting sun
character turns around and begins jogging back toward the covered area

agents.ego_description: reaching the waterfront end of the promenade, turning to face the setting sun, then jogging back toward the covered structure

entered.detail: open water visible beyond the promenade end
bright sun low on the horizon creating lens flare

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the open waterfront plaza as the setting sun creates a brilliant lens flare. After reaching the end of the promenade, the character turns around and begins jogging back, with the covered structure now behind and palm trees silhouetted against the bright sky.

events.description: passing yellow maintenance vehicle parked under the canopy
approaching the exit to the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: jogging back through the covered section, passing food kiosks and a parked maintenance vehicle

entered.detail: small green and yellow food stand with service window
yellow painted food kiosk with satellite dish on roof
parked yellow utility vehicle with black accents
same digital billboard now visible on the left side when returning

segments.scene_description: The character jogs back under the curved glass canopy, passing colorful food kiosks and a parked yellow maintenance vehicle. The digital billboard appears again on the left as the character approaches the transition back to the open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza alongside covered structure

events.description: exiting the covered structure into the populated open plaza
encountering groups of pedestrians walking in various directions

agents.ego_description: jogging through the open plaza, weaving past other pedestrians walking along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful outfit with pink leg warmers walking away from camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking alongside the character path

entered.detail: open paved area with white line markings and scattered pedestrians
large billboard displaying advertisements near the plaza entrance
stairway and escalator entrance with signage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered structure into a populated open plaza where several pedestrians are walking. The curved glass canopy now runs parallel on the right side as the character jogs past a large digital screen and approaches an escalator structure, with the setting sun casting long shadows across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from a sheltered walkway to a brilliant open plaza and back again. It begins with the character jogging under a curved glass and wood canopy, moving through long shadows toward a digital billboard and the open waterfront. As the character emerges into the plaza, the setting sun creates a brilliant lens flare before the camera pivots, turning back toward the covered structure with silhouetted palm trees against the bright sky. The scene then shifts back under the canopy, passing colorful food kiosks and a yellow maintenance vehicle, before finally exiting into a populated open plaza. The movement concludes as the character jogs past pedestrians and a large digital screen toward an escalator structure, with the setting sun casting deep shadows across the pavement.
